title: Isolation and qPCR for S. Typhi detection from River Water Samples
author: Nicholas Feasey

steps.title: Use GIS-informed mapping to identify candidate...
steps.instruction: Use GIS-informed mapping to identify candidate water bodies (streams, rivers, drainage).

steps.title: Record GPS coordinates and environmental context for each site
steps.instruction: Record GPS coordinates and environmental context for each site.

steps.title: Assess for accessibility and safety; log...
steps.instruction: Assess for accessibility and safety; log human or animal activity and environmental conditions.

steps.title: Complete the site metadata form with
steps.instruction: Complete the site metadata form with: Date/time Weather conditions Recent rainfall Visible contamination Sample type(s) deployed Field team ID

steps.title: Don appropriate PPE
steps.instruction: Don appropriate PPE.

steps.title: Submerge sterile Nalgene bottle ~30 cm...
steps.instruction: Submerge sterile Nalgene bottle ~30 cm below the surface, upstream of your body position.

steps.title: Collect 1 litre of water
steps.instruction: Collect 1 litre of water.

steps.title: Seal bottle
steps.instruction: Seal bottle.

steps.title: Change gloves and clean surfaces with 80% ethanol
steps.instruction: Change gloves and clean surfaces with 80% ethanol.

steps.title: Affix sample label
steps.instruction: Affix sample label.

steps.title: Log sample ID, time, temperature, turbidity, pH, and conductivity
steps.instruction: Log sample ID, time, temperature, turbidity, pH, and conductivity.

steps.title: Prepare swab by folding sterile gauze in a pleated/accordion fashion
steps.instruction: Prepare swab by folding sterile gauze in a pleated/accordion fashion.

steps.title: Tie center securely with sterile fishing...
steps.instruction: Tie center securely with sterile fishing line (1–2 m retrieval length).

steps.title: Further instructions can be found at
steps.instruction: Further instructions can be found at: Construction of a Moore's Swap - Typhoid ES Consortium or, Sikorski and Levine, 2020 - See Protocol References at the end of this document

steps.title: Place swab into mid-stream using line...
steps.instruction: Place swab into mid-stream using line secured to a stable structure (e.g., bridge, tree).

steps.title: Deploy for 48–72 hours
steps.instruction: Deploy for 48–72 hours.

steps.title: Retrieve place directly into sterile Whirl-Pak bag
steps.instruction: Retrieve place directly into sterile Whirl-Pak bag.

steps.title: Change gloves and clean surfaces with 80% ethanol
steps.instruction: Change gloves and clean surfaces with 80% ethanol.

steps.title: Label bag and log
steps.instruction: Label bag and log: Deployment duration Retrieval time Any swab loss events

steps.title: Place all samples in cooler boxes at 2–8°C
steps.instruction: Place all samples in cooler boxes at 2–8°C.

steps.title: Transport to lab within 3 hours ideally, 6–8 hours maximum
steps.instruction: Transport to lab within 3 hours ideally, 6–8 hours maximum.

steps.title: If delay to processing is unavoidable,...
steps.instruction: If delay to processing is unavoidable, store at 4°C and process within 24 hours.

steps.title: Record condition on arrival and any temperature deviations
steps.instruction: Record condition on arrival and any temperature deviations.

steps.title: For water
steps.instruction: For water: filter as much of the sample as possible through 0.45 µm membrane. - If filters block, change the filter up to 5 membranes - Stop filtering after 1 hour per sample - Any water that was not filtered, record volume remaining

steps.title: Place samples into culture media
steps.instruction: Place samples into culture media: Resuspend filter in 10 mL 2% bile - broth For Moore swabs: directly submerge whole swab into 250 mL 2% bile - broth.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 ± 2 °C for 18–24 h
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 ± 2 °C for 18–24 h.

steps.title: Aseptically transfer 5 mL of incubated...
steps.instruction: Aseptically transfer 5 mL of incubated bile - broth into 5 mL of double strength Selenite F broth.

steps.title: Incubate at 41 ± 2 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 41 ± 2 °C for 12–18 h (static incubation).

steps.title: Label all broths with corresponding sample ID and time
steps.instruction: Label all broths with corresponding sample ID and time.

steps.title: Plate the culture media onto modified...
steps.instruction: Plate the culture media onto modified Chromogenic Agar Salmonella esterase (mCASE) media: Streak for single colonies Spread plate at 1:10 dilution Spread plate at 1:100 dilution

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h.

steps.title: Observe for blue-green colonies (indicative of S
steps.instruction: Observe for blue-green colonies (indicative of S . Typhi).

steps.title: Pick presumptive colonies for molecular confirmation
steps.instruction: Pick presumptive colonies for molecular confirmation.

steps.title: DNA extraction was performed on isolates...
steps.instruction: DNA extraction was performed on isolates using the boilate, or thermal lysis, method

steps.title: Prepare reaction mix (25 µL total volume)
steps.instruction: Prepare reaction mix (25 µL total volume): %s %s

steps.title: Cycling Conditions
steps.instruction: Cycling Conditions: %s %s

steps.title: Positive sample = amplification of all...
steps.instruction: Positive sample = amplification of all three targets (ttr, tviB, staG) with Ct < 38.

steps.title: Include controls
steps.instruction: Include controls: NTC qPCR Negative Positive control

steps.title: Record Ct values, amplification plots, and...
steps.instruction: Record Ct values, amplification plots, and annotate inconclusive or single-target results for re-testing.

steps.title: Add 500 uL of nuclease free water to a 1
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL of nuclease free water to a 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Heat at 96 °C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Heat at 96 °C for 10 minutes

steps.title: Pick 1 to 2 colonies and emulsify into the tube
steps.instruction: Pick 1 to 2 colonies and emulsify into the tube

steps.title: Centrifuge at full speed for 5 seconds to remove condensation
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at full speed for 5 seconds to remove condensation

steps.title: All colonies of appropriate morphology and...
steps.instruction: All colonies of appropriate morphology and with the ttr gene should be sub-cultured onto fresh mCASE agar

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h.

steps.title: All pure growth should be harvested...
steps.instruction: All pure growth should be harvested and placed into Microbank Cryopreservation Beads If culture is not pure, sub-culture until pure

steps.title: All suspected S
steps.instruction: All suspected S . Typhi (positive amplification for ttr , tviB and staG ) should be archived separately from the Non-Typhoidal Salmonella isolates

steps.title: Samples are stored at Ultra-Low Temperature...
steps.instruction: Samples are stored at Ultra-Low Temperature (-80 °C), ensuring minimal freeze-thawing to ensure longevity.

steps.title: All isolates selected for whole genome...
steps.instruction: All isolates selected for whole genome sequencing will need to be retrieved from Cryobeads

steps.title: Take one beads from the tube,...
steps.instruction: Take one beads from the tube, and place onto a non-selective agar

steps.title: Make a pool with the bead,...
steps.instruction: Make a pool with the bead, and then streak the plates as normal for single colonies

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 18–24 h.

steps.title: Check for purity by taking one...
steps.instruction: Check for purity by taking one half of a colony for qPCR and subculture the other half (see above sections).

steps.title: When selected isolates are pure, a...
steps.instruction: When selected isolates are pure, a 1 μL loop of bacterial growth from nutrient agar and inoculating 1.5 mL of nutrient broth, which was incubated at 37 ± 1°C for 18 to 20 hours

steps.title: After incubation, samples were heat inactivated...
steps.instruction: After incubation, samples were heat inactivated at 95 ± 2°C for 10 minutes

steps.title: 700 μL transferred into a deep 96-well plate
steps.instruction: 700 μL transferred into a deep 96-well plate

steps.title: centrifuged for 20 minutes at 2,500 x g
steps.instruction: centrifuged for 20 minutes at 2,500 x g

steps.title: The supernatant was discarded and replaced...
steps.instruction: The supernatant was discarded and replaced with 220 μL of ATL cell lysis buffer and 20 μL proteinase K

steps.title: incubated at 60 ± 5 °C for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: incubated at 60 ± 5 °C for 30 minutes

steps.title: 4 μL of RNase was added...
steps.instruction: 4 μL of RNase was added and incubated for 15 minutes at 37 ± 1°C

steps.title: The plate was loaded onto the QiaSymphony
steps.instruction: The plate was loaded onto the QiaSymphony

steps.title: a DSP Virus/Pathogen mini-Kit was used...
steps.instruction: a DSP Virus/Pathogen mini-Kit was used with the default extraction profile on the machine

steps.title: Yield and purity of each genomic...
steps.instruction: Yield and purity of each genomic DNA sample after extraction was determined using the Qubit 1x dsDNA Broad Range Assay kit
